description.pt-br: O afetado recebe -2 CRM quando forçado ou induzido a falar, se 1d4 <= 2 o personagem se torna incapaz de compreender e entonar palavras.
description.en-us: The affected receives -2 CRM when forced or induced to speak; if 1d4 <= 2, the character becomes unable to understand and speak words.
